raw_source.title: [Remote] TonUP is looking for Senior Product Manager
raw_source.body:
## About
TonUP is an innovative platform built on the TON Blockchain that aims to revolutionize the way projects are launched and supported in the crypto space. It provides a comprehensive ecosystem for token launches, community participation, and project growth. TonUP is on a mission to discover and nurture the most promising projects out there, bringing exciting opportunities to the wider community. With the unwavering support of TON Foundation and Foresight X, they are dedicated to empowering assets with remarkable potential on the TON Blockchain, fostering the growth of a vibrant TON ecosystem.


## Job Description:
As a Senior Product Manager, you will be at the forefront of our product development, driving the vision, strategy, and execution of our DeFi solutions. You will lead our product development initiatives, combining expertise in product management, project management, and UX design. This role demands a unique blend of technical understanding, user-centric design thinking, and project management experience to deliver products that meet our high standards and user expectations.

## Key Responsibilities
- Product Strategy and Vision: Define the product vision and strategy, ensuring alignment withthe company’s goals and market demand. Conduct market research, competitor analysis, and user feedback sessions to inform product direction.
- End-to-End Product Management: Lead the product lifecycle from conception through launch and iteration. Prioritize product features and manage the roadmap, balancing customer needs,business priorities, and technical feasibility.
- Project Management: Plan, initiate, and manage projects, ensuring on-time, high-quality delivery. Apply agile methodologies to manage the team’s workflow.
- UX Design: Champion user-centric design principles. Collaborate with designers to create intuitive, engaging user experiences.
- Cross-Functional Communication: Work closely with engineering, operations and leadership teams to ensure product-market fit and seamless go-to-market execution

## Job Requirements:
- Experience: Minimum of 5 years in product management, with a proven track record of launching and growing products, preferably in DeFi or fintech.
Crypto-native: Strong understanding of the crypto ecosystem. Be a crypto degen.
- Technical Skills: Strong understanding of blockchain technology, smart contracts, and decentralized applications.
- Project Management Skills: Experienced in agile project management methodologies. Able to manage multiple projects simultaneously, with excellent organizational and time-management skills.
- Design Sensitivity: Strong grasp of UX/UI principles and a user-centric approach to product development. Experience conducting user research and usability testing.
- Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal. Able to articulate product vision and complex ideas to a variety of audiences


## Job Nature

- Full-time
- Remote

## Salary and Benefits
$3,000 - $5,000 / month
Benefits:
- Cutting-edge Projects: Work on the forefront of blockchain technology, contributing to projects that could redefine industries.
- Growth Opportunities: Continuous learning environment where you can hone existing skills and acquire new ones in the fast-evolving Web3 space.
- Collaborative Culture: Be part of a supportive, inclusive team that values your input and encourages sharing of ideas.
- Competitive Compensation: Attractive salary and potential for blockchain/token incentives.


## Contact
elena.liu@msino.io
